Lonnel Snow
Alias Lonny[1]
Allegiance House Stark
Culture Northmen
Born 152–195 AC[2]
Father Brandon Stark
Mother Wylla Fenn
Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Lonnel Snow, known as Lonny, was a bastard son of Lord Brandon Stark and Lady Wylla Fenn. He had three younger half-siblings by his father; Rodwell, Beron and Arsa.[1][3]
